plan.failureSummary: The test chatbot evaluation was aborted because sending messages requires either a paid subscription or providing a custom OpenAI API Key. The tool call flow terminated when the agent reached the Advanced Settings modal and verified that it could not proceed without these credentials.
observedIndicators: The agent marked the objective as not completable with rationale referencing OpenAI API Key requirement
The screenshot shows the settings dialog demanding a paid subscription plan or an OpenAI API key

remediationSteps.summary: Provide an OpenAI API Key or premium session context for the chatbot test
remediationSteps.details: Configure the test environment to provide a valid OpenAI API Key in the settings, or bypass the payment/API wall by using a pre-authenticated session/cookie with Pro access.

remediationSteps.summary: Inject API key into local state or UI settings during setup
remediationSteps.details: Update the Playwright test script to automatically inject the OpenAI API key into the application's settings UI or localStorage before starting the page.ai evaluation block.

plan.notes: The live screenshot confirms the presence of a modal stating: 'Briefcase has a limit of 10 messages per user. To send more messages, please upgrade to the Pro Plan or set your OpenAI API key.' and provides fields for Email/Upgrade and OpenAI API Key. Since the test environment is not seeded with a valid OpenAI API key or an upgraded pro account session, the AI agent correctly marked the objective as not completable.
